title: pavonia × gledhillii
intro: Pavonia × gledhillii, also known as Mexican rose mallow or Rose Mallow, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family and is native to Mexico. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Pavonia × gledhillii include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used as a natural dye due to its vibrant pink and red colors.
